Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: You lunge for the leaves and, for a second, you think that he's dramatically screaming 'NOOO' like he's in some theatrical production. If he truly did, this is now drowned out by the shattering of a plate upon the floor.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: As you originally suspected, the source of the smell is his breakfast. Apparently, he hid the leftovers in the branches overhead for some reason, and you ended up knocking them off.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: You play with the idea of apologizing for ruining the rest of his meal, until you notice what it is: between the shards of whatever light material their dishes are made out of, yellow slices of potato gleam in the occasional sunray.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: The perfectly moist fries are soaked in a thick, dark-brown liquid that reminds you of gravy -- it certainly smells like it -- and chunks of something pale intermingle with the rest of it... oh.

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: It is not what it looks like !

Line.Text: After the 'passion' he flaunted in your last conversation, you find yourself so shocked that there's only one thing you can say.
